tier.info_text: These were the members of Clan Gangrel at one time: * Fang * Janet Weaver * Logan Reeves * Private Hudson * McLir * Fizzy Fitzgerald * Marigold * Nikola Sleat

The Gangrel were the most powerful and most numerous clan in the city, mostly due to the fact that if you included the Prince, almost half the gangrel were of the Prince's bloodline. (Note: No Player may start of the McLir bloodline).

topic.title: Vampire Lore
topic.failure_text: Your research into vampires turns up some interesting develops. Apparently vampires are not supernatural creatures, but homo sapiens with a mutant gene called the solarus imperius gene. It's what gives them their unique vulnerability to sunlight but they are certainly not supernatural as most believe.

tier.info_text: Vampires are undead creatures that drink blood.
Vampires are organized into clans, each with unique powers and flaws.

The Camarilla is the largest vampire sect, enforcing the Masquerade.
This is more text.
